nasb.text: When Ben-hadad heard this message, as he was drinking with the kings in the temporary shelters, he said to his servants, “Station yourselves.” So they stationed themselves against the city.

esv.text: When Ben-hadad heard this message as he was drinking with the kings in the booths, he said to his men, “Take your positions.” And they took their positions against the city.

cnv.text: 便．哈達與眾王正在帳棚裡喝酒，一聽見了這話，就對他的臣僕說：“你們列隊進攻。”他們就列隊進攻那城。

ccb.text: 便·哈达和诸王正在营中饮酒，听见这话，就吩咐属下准备攻城。
